artifacts.evidence: Mentor approved proposal pull request and recorded G9A decision.
Diagrams and decisions trace provider, graph, state, APIs, approval, and deployment.
Policy, splits, metrics, slices, baseline, and leakage controls are versioned.
Owners reviewed release blockers and accepted prototype risks.
Five milestone reviews link demos, tests, and mentor decisions.
Risk matrix links unit, integration, contract, recovery, and adversarial tests.
Baseline and both iterations preserve diagnoses, regressions, and rejected changes.
Reproducible report includes denominators, slices, holdout, cost, latency, and caveats.
Material generated changes include human review, corrections, and checks.
Wheel inventory, clean install, Compose startup, and external smoke are recorded.
Threats, blockers, hardening, operating gaps, and accepted risks are explicit.
Clean-clone reviewer reproduced setup, fixture demo, and evaluation commands.
Five-minute fixture script demonstrates success, API failure, and crash recovery.
Mentor checked two bullets against repository evidence and removed inflated claims.
Story bank covers design, evaluation, failure, AI correction, and production tradeoffs.
AI and mentor findings link accepted changes or evidence-backed rejection rationale.
